stemHtml: What are the two functions of GBAS?

options.a: When the aircraft is approaching the airfield and is fitted with a GBAS receiver, GBAS replaces the aircraft's on-board GPS position and provides the non precision approach path details.
options.b: When the aircraft is approaching the airfield and is fitted with a GBAS receiver, GBAS replaces the aircraft's on-board GPS position and provides the precision approach path details.
options.c: When the aircraft is approaching the airfield and is fitted with a GBAS receiver, GBAS corrects the aircraft's on-board GPS position and provides the non precision approach path details.
options.d: When the aircraft is approaching the airfield and is fitted with a GBAS receiver, GBAS correct the aircraft's on-board GPS position and provides the precision approach path details.
